engineGuide.h2: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 4.0L Petrol PHEV
entries.history: Core V8 hybrid powertrain for Flying Spur Hybrid, combining twin-turbo petrol with electric motor for 536hp combined output.
commonFailures: 12V battery drain during high-voltage charging - TSB 2068627/5, causes flat battery warnings at typical 40k-70k miles.
DTC P0B2500/P0B2600 - high-voltage battery management control unit faults trigger yellow engine warning light.
Hybrid system integration faults - complex PHEV architecture requires dealer-level diagnostic equipment.
entries.cta: Get quotes for CVUB Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

entries.title: 4.0L Petrol PHEV Performance
entries.history: Speed variant calibration of CVUB, delivering 782hp combined output with enhanced electric motor tuning.
commonFailures: Performance-tuned hybrid thermal stress - higher output increases load on battery management system.
CVUB timing chain stretch - early V8 hybrid units may require preventative replacement before 80k miles.
Oil consumption monitoring - excessive use may indicate ring or valve seal wear on high-mileage performance units.
entries.cta: Get quotes for CVUB-S Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

entries.title: 4.0L Petrol PHEV Luxury
entries.history: Luxury-focused calibration of CVUB for Azure and Mulliner variants, prioritising refinement over peak output.
commonFailures: High-voltage battery warning lights - red HV battery indicator requires immediate specialist diagnosis.
Electric motor integration faults - e-motor failure requires complete powertrain removal and recalibration.
12V auxiliary battery issues - charging system faults during HV battery top-up cycles.
entries.cta: Get quotes for CVUA Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Petrol PHEV
entries.history: Early-generation plug-in hybrid powertrain for Flying Spur Hybrid, featuring 3.0L V6 with electric motor integration.
commonFailures: Early PHEV calibration issues - software updates required for optimal hybrid transition and efficiency.
High-voltage battery management faults - red warning light indicates specialist diagnosis needed.
Electric motor failure - integrated motor replacement requires powertrain removal and hybrid system validation.
entries.cta: Get quotes for V6-PHEV Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

Every rebuilt engine comes with a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

commonProblems.h2: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid's parallel PHEV architecture combines a twin-turbo V8 or V6 with electric motor integration, creating unique failure patterns. The CVUB V8 hybrid and V6-PHEV units dominate replacement enquiries, particularly for high-voltage battery management faults and 12V charging issues. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded hybrid system components designed to address original failure points - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: 12V Battery Drain During HV Charging - Why Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Owners Report Flat Batteries
problems.affectedModels: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Azure, V8 Hybrid, Speed (2023-2026, CVUB/CVUA); V6 Hybrid, City Specification (2022-2024, V6-PHEV)
problems.rootCause: Technical Service Bulletin 2068627/5 identifies a charging control logic issue where the 12V auxiliary battery drains during high-voltage battery top-up cycles, causing warning lights and no-start conditions.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Dealer-level diagnostic reset, 12V battery replacement, charging logic calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may recur if underlying HV system fault persists

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - HV Battery Management Module Repair
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Removal of high-voltage battery control unit, bench testing, component-level repair or replacement
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses root cause; requires hybrid-certified technician and safety procedures

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt CVUB/V6-PHEV unit with calibrated hybrid system, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage units; eliminates recurring hybrid integration faults

problems.recommendation: On a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid worth £120,000+, if the 12V drain recurs after software updates, investing in a rebuilt hybrid powertrain often proves more economical than repeated dealer diagnostics. We recommend obtaining multiple specialist quotes before committing to HV system repairs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt CVUB engine prices for your Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid

problems.h4: DTC P0B2500/P0B2600 - High-Voltage Battery Management Faults Triggering Yellow Warning Light
problems.affectedModels: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid all variants (2022-2026, CVUB/CVUA/V6-PHEV)
problems.rootCause: Fault codes P0B2500/P0B2600 indicate communication errors or sensor failures within the high-voltage battery management control unit, often triggered by thermal cycling, moisture ingress, or connector corrosion in the PHEV architecture.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: OBD-II scan, connector cleaning, software reset, test drive validation
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable for intermittent faults; high recurrence risk on aged units

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - HV Battery Control Unit Replacement
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Safe HV system isolation, control unit removal/replacement, calibration, system validation
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses specific fault code; requires hybrid-certified equipment and training

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with updated HV management components, bench-tested, 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable long-term solution for units over 60k miles or with multiple fault codes

problems.recommendation: If P0B2500/P0B2600 appears alongside red HV battery warning lights, the fault is likely systemic. For Flying Spur Hybrids beyond warranty, a rebuilt powertrain with upgraded HV components typically offers better value than component-level repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for P0B2500 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

problems.h4: Red High-Voltage Battery Warning Light - Critical Hybrid System Faults
problems.affectedModels: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid all variants (2022-2026, CVUB/CVUA/V6-PHEV)
problems.rootCause: Red HV battery warning indicates serious faults in the high-voltage system - potentially battery cell imbalance, inverter failure, or isolation monitoring errors. Immediate inspection required to prevent safety risks or further damage.

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - HV System Diagnostic + Component Repair
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Safe HV isolation, fault code analysis, targeted component repair (inverter, contactor, sensor)
repairOptions.longevity: Viable for isolated faults; requires hybrid-certified technician and equipment

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt CVUB/V6-PHEV unit with validated HV system, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for red warning lights with multiple fault codes or high-mileage units

problems.recommendation: A red HV battery warning is a safety-critical fault. Do not drive the vehicle. For Flying Spur Hybrids outside warranty, compare rebuilt powertrain quotes immediately - the complexity of HV repairs often makes replacement the more economical choice.
problems.cta: Compare Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid hybrid engine replacement prices now

problems.h4: Electric Motor Integration Failure - Why Flying Spur Hybrid E-Motor Faults Require Powertrain Removal
problems.affectedModels: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid all variants (2022-2026, CVUB/CVUA/V6-PHEV)
problems.rootCause: The electric motor is integrated within the hybrid transmission housing; bearing wear, winding faults, or resolver errors trigger loss of electric drive, reduced performance, and hybrid system fault codes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Powertrain removal, e-motor disassembly, bearing/winding repair, reassembly, hybrid calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Complex labour-intensive repair; success depends on extent of internal damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with new/integrated e-motor, validated hybrid system, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable solution; eliminates risk of recurring e-motor or integration faults

problems.recommendation: E-motor failures on the Flying Spur Hybrid almost always require powertrain removal. Given the labour intensity, a rebuilt hybrid powertrain with upgraded components typically offers better long-term value than attempting component-level e-motor repair.
problems.cta: Find rebuilt Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid electric motor integrated engines

problems.h4: CVUB Timing Chain Stretch - Early V8 Hybrid Units at Risk
problems.affectedModels: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid V8 variants (2023-2024, early CVUB)
problems.rootCause: Early CVUB V8 hybrid units may experience timing chain tensioner wear or chain stretch due to hybrid start-stop cycling, causing rattling noises, misfires, and potential valve timing errors.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Engine removal, timing cover access, chain/tensioner replacement, hybrid system recalibration
repairOptions.longevity: Best performed before symptoms appear; prevents catastrophic engine damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt CVUB unit with updated timing components, validated hybrid system, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if chain stretch has caused secondary damage or for units over 80k miles

problems.recommendation: If you own an early CVUB Flying Spur Hybrid (2023-2024) approaching 60k miles, consider preventative timing chain service. If rattling or misfires are present, obtain rebuilt engine quotes immediately to avoid valve damage.
problems.cta: Compare CVUB timing chain Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine prices

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid
finalCta.paragraph: The Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid's complex PHEV architecture demands specialist expertise for diagnosis and repair. Whether you're facing 12V drain issues, P0B2500 fault codes, or red HV battery warnings, EngineMarket connects you with UK hybrid-certified specialists who understand these systems. Compare rebuilt, reconditioned and used engine prices today - every unit includes upgraded hybrid components and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

fuelTypes.h2: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Engines by Fuel Type
fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early V6-PHEV to the latest CVUB Speed.

items.title: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Petrol PHEV Engines
items.description: All Flying Spur Hybrid variants use petrol plug-in hybrid powertrains, with V6-PHEV on early models and CVUB-series V8 hybrids dominating from 2023 onwards.
items.descriptor: All Flying Spur Hybrid variants use petrol plug-in hybrid powertrains, with V6-PHEV on early models and CVUB-series V8 hybrids dominating from 2023 onwards.
items.familiesLabel: Common Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Petrol PHEV Engine Families
families: CVUB - core V8 hybrid (Azure, V8 Hybrid), 12V drain and P0B2500 fault codes common
CVUB-S - Speed performance calibration, thermal stress on HV management at high output
V6-PHEV - early V6 hybrid, software calibration updates required for optimal operation
knownFor: Complex parallel PHEV architecture requiring dealer-level diagnostics for fault codes
12V battery drain during HV charging documented in TSB 2068627/5
High-voltage battery warning lights (yellow/red) indicating specialist attention needed
Electric motor integration faults requiring complete powertrain removal for repair
items.cta: Get quotes for Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Petrol PHEV replacement engines

items.title: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Hybrid System Notes
items.description: Flying Spur Hybrid uses parallel plug-in hybrid technology where both petrol engine and electric motor can drive wheels independently or together.
items.descriptor: Flying Spur Hybrid uses parallel plug-in hybrid technology where both petrol engine and electric motor can drive wheels independently or together.
items.familiesLabel: Common Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Hybrid System Notes Engine Families
importantNotes: Generic OBD-II scanners cannot diagnose HV system faults - dealer-level equipment required

Used donor engines require HV battery health verification pre-purchase
Supply & fit service essential - high-voltage safety certification required for installation

engineYears.h2: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid production run, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Flying Spur Hybrid debuted with a 3.0L V6 plug-in hybrid powertrain, establishing the PHEV architecture for the model range.
keyChanges: Launch of Flying Spur Hybrid with V6-PHEV powertrain
City Specification variant introduced for urban-focused equipment
Parallel PHEV system with 25-30 mile electric-only range
mainEngines: V6-PHEV - 3.0L petrol PHEV (V6 Hybrid, City Specification)
popularModels: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid City Specification
knownFor: Early PHEV calibration software requiring updates for optimal operation
HV battery management faults triggering warning lights on early units
Strong urban efficiency but limited high-mileage reliability data
years.cta: Get quotes for 2022 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid replacement engines
years.ticker: V6-PHEV engine replacement • Flying Spur Hybrid not charging • yellow engine warning light V6 hybrid
enquiries: yellow engine warning light V6 hybrid

years.description: The CVUB 4.0L V8 hybrid replaced the V6-PHEV as the core powertrain, delivering refined performance and improved hybrid integration.
keyChanges: Introduction of CVUB 4.0L twin-turbo V8 hybrid powertrain
Azure and Speed variants launched with V8 hybrid calibration
Updated hybrid management software addressing early V6 issues
mainEngines: CVUB - 4.0L petrol PHEV (Azure, V8 Hybrid, Speed)
knownFor: TSB 2068627/5 identifies 12V battery drain during HV charging
DTC P0B2500/P0B2600 fault codes on HV battery management unit
Strong performance but complex diagnostics requiring specialist equipment
years.cta: Get quotes for 2023 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid replacement engines
years.ticker: CVUB engine replacement • P0B2500 fault code • 12V battery drain Flying Spur Hybrid

years.description: CVUA luxury calibration introduced for Mulliner, with software refinements improving hybrid transition and fault code management.
keyChanges: CVUA engine code for Mulliner luxury calibration
Software updates addressing P0B2500/P0B2600 fault frequency
S Specification variant launched with sport-tuned hybrid mapping
knownFor: Improved HV system reliability with updated control modules
Timing chain stretch reported on early CVUB units approaching 60k miles
Electric motor integration faults still requiring powertrain removal
years.cta: Get quotes for 2024 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid replacement engines
years.ticker: Mulliner hybrid engine • CVUB timing chain • electric motor failure Flying Spur

years.description: CVUB-series engines benefit from accumulated service data, with revised components addressing known failure points on high-mileage units.
keyChanges: Revised HV battery management components on new CVUB units
Enhanced diagnostic protocols for hybrid system fault isolation
knownFor: Reduced frequency of P0B2500/P0B2600 codes on revised units
Oil consumption monitoring recommended on high-mileage CVUB engines
Strong demand for rebuilt units as early 2023 models reach replacement mileage
years.cta: Get quotes for 2025 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid replacement engines
years.ticker: 2025 CVUB engine • rebuilt Flying Spur Hybrid • hybrid system warranty

years.description: Current production CVUB/CVUA units incorporate all service bulletins and component revisions, offering improved long-term reliability for replacement buyers.
keyChanges: Final component revisions for CVUB-series addressing all known TSBs
Enhanced hybrid calibration for smoother petrol/electric transition
Updated warranty terms for hybrid system components on new units
knownFor: Best-in-class hybrid integration with minimal fault code frequency
Donor vehicles typically 300-1,221 miles for used engine sourcing
Premium pricing for latest-year rebuilt units reflecting component updates
years.cta: Get quotes for 2026 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid replacement engines

faq.h2: Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine?
items.answer: Replacing a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine typically costs £8,500-£22,000 for supply-only rebuilt units, depending on variant and engine code. Supply & fit adds £2,500-£4,500.
keyPoints: Used engines from £8,500; rebuilt from £14,500; reconditioned from £18,000
CVUB V8 hybrid commands premium over V6-PHEV due to demand
Hybrid system calibration included in all rebuilt unit pricing
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine prices today

items.question: What are the most common Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine problems?
items.answer: The most reported issues are 12V battery drain during HV charging (TSB 2068627/5), DTC P0B2500/P0B2600 HV management faults, and electric motor integration failures.
keyPoints: 12V drain causes flat battery warnings at 40k-70k miles typical
P0B2500/P0B2600 trigger yellow engine warning light requiring specialist diagnosis
Red HV battery warning indicates critical fault needing immediate attention
items.cta: Get quotes for P0B2500 Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine or buying a new car?
items.answer: For well-maintained Flying Spur Hybrids valued over £100,000, engine replacement at £14,500-£22,000 typically offers better value than purchasing a replacement vehicle.
keyPoints: Rebuilt hybrid powertrains include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
Complex PHEV architecture makes dealer repairs often exceed replacement cost
Supply & fit service available nationwide through hybrid-certified specialists
items.cta: Find out if your Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid is worth repairing

items.question: Can any garage replace a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine?
items.answer: No - Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement requires hybrid-certified technicians with high-voltage safety training and dealer-level diagnostic equipment.
keyPoints: Generic OBD scanners cannot diagnose HV system faults like P0B2500
High-voltage isolation procedures essential for safe powertrain removal
EngineMarket specialists are vetted for hybrid system expertise
items.cta: Find a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid hybrid-certified engine specialist

items.question: What warranty comes with a replacement Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine?
items.answer: All rebuilt, reconditioned and remanufactured engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering both combustion and hybrid components.
keyPoints: Warranty covers CVUB, CVUA and V6-PHEV hybrid powertrains
Hybrid system validation performed pre-dispatch on all units
Confirm exact terms with chosen supplier before ordering
items.cta: Compare warranty terms for Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

items.question: How long does Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical turnaround is 5-10 days for supply & fit including hybrid system calibration, though complex HV faults may require additional diagnostic time.
keyPoints: Used engines often available for quicker dispatch from verified donors
Rebuilt units require bench testing and hybrid validation before shipping
Nationwide delivery included on most EngineMarket specialist quotes
items.cta: Get a timeline quote for your Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine replacement

items.question: Which Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine is most reliable?
items.answer: 2024+ CVUB and CVUA V8 hybrid units benefit from revised HV management components addressing early P0B2500/P0B2600 fault frequency.
keyPoints: Early 2022 V6-PHEV units had more calibration-related issues
CVUB-S Speed variants require careful thermal management monitoring
Regular hybrid system software updates improve long-term reliability
items.cta: Compare reliability data for Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine codes

items.question: Do I need to replace the hybrid battery when replacing the engine?
items.answer: Not necessarily - the high-voltage battery is a separate component, but its health should be verified before installing a replacement powertrain.
keyPoints: Request HV battery health report when sourcing used donor engines
Rebuilt powertrains include HV system validation but not battery replacement
Battery replacement adds £3,000-£8,000 if required separately
items.cta: Enquire about Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid hybrid battery and engine packages

items.question: Can I fit a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine myself?
items.answer: No - DIY installation is strongly discouraged due to high-voltage safety risks and the need for dealer-level hybrid system calibration equipment.
keyPoints: High-voltage isolation procedures require certified training and equipment
Hybrid control module programming needs Bentley diagnostic tools
Incorrect installation can void warranty and create safety hazards
items.cta: Find supply & fit Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine specialists near you

items.question: Where can I buy a Bentley Flying Spur Hybrid engine in the UK?
items.answer: EngineMarket connects you with vetted UK specialists offering rebuilt, reconditioned and used Flying Spur Hybrid engines with transparent pricing and warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Compare quotes from 8+ hybrid-certified specialists in one request
All suppliers verified for Bentley hybrid system expertise
Free nationwide delivery on most engine orders
